course.title: Build an Agent Economy from Scratch
course.tagline: Publish a paid capability, collect USDC via escrow, and ship a consumer agent.

m1.title: Protocol v2 overview
m1.concept: Capabilities, receipts, and federated discovery start at /.well-known/ai-market.json.

m2.title: SDK & Hub integration
m2.concept: Register, discover, and invoke across a real hub.

m3.title: Escrow & payment channels
m3.concept: Hold funds until delivery; stream micropayments.

m4.title: Reputation & trust
m4.concept: Signed receipts feed LUMEN-style reputation graphs.

m5.title: Publish a capability
m5.concept: Ship a metered API other agents can buy.

m6.title: Capstone: paid agent loop
m6.concept: Consumer agent pays via escrow; provider gets USDC.

site.quickstart_intro: Clone the repo, install deps, and run labs locally or in Colab.
site.certificate_intro: Complete all labs and exercises to unlock your certificate.
site.certificate_locked: Check off all labs and exercises to unlock
site.footer: Part of the AIMarket ecosystem — Protocol v2, SDK, Hub, escrow, and channels as a live sandbox.

exercises.heading: Your turn
exercises.lab01_hint: Add a field check to validate_well_known. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m1
exercises.lab02_hint: Discover summarize and invoke it. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m2
exercises.lab03_hint: Open a channel with budget $1.00 and close it. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m3
exercises.lab04_hint: Sign your own receipt and verify it. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m4
exercises.lab05_hint: Register a custom capability and invoke it. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m5
exercises.lab06_hint: Run the full hire() cycle in the sandbox. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m6

lab05.description: Sentiment score as a metered capability

lab06.sdk_missing: Capstone skipped: the aimarket-agent SDK is not installed. Install it with  pip install -e ".[sandbox]"  (~50 MB, run once) and re-run this lab. Labs 1–5 and the exercises run without it.
